category_sources: Official README describes node-build as a command-line tool to download, compile, and install Node versions.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses node-build.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation, usage, build definitions, environment variables, patches, checksums, and mirrors.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/nodenv/node-build; per instruction, not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README describes installing Node versions as a nodenv plugin or standalone command.
